task_completion.description: Screaming Frog SEO Spider is launched
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog SEO Spider application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Custom Search is configured with the correct search term
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Custom Search configuration window (Configuration > Custom > Search) is open and shows a rule searching for '<meta name="keywords">' or '<meta name="keywords"'.

task_completion.description: Custom Search scope is set to HTML
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Custom Search configuration window, the search scope setting for the rule is explicitly set to 'HTML' (ensuring it checks source code rather than visible page text).

task_completion.description: The target URL is entered and crawled
task_completion.visual_evidence: The URL 'https://crawler-test.com/' is visible in the main URL input bar at the top of the Screaming Frog window, and the crawl progress indicates it has started or finished.

task_completion.description: The Custom Search report is exported to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager window shows the file 'meta_keywords_audit.csv' being saved to or existing in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to configure and run the crawl
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Screaming Frog graphical interface, not terminal commands or scripts executing the crawl.

integrity.description: The export was performed using Screaming Frog's export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog originates from Screaming Frog (e.g., via Bulk Export or the Custom Search tab's export button), rather than the agent manually creating a CSV file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not artificially fabricate search hits
integrity.visual_evidence: The Custom Search results should naturally show 0 hits, as the target site does not contain the tag. Any screenshots showing fabricated hits for this tag indicate tampering.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://crawler-test.com/. Expected export path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/meta_keywords_audit.csv. Search term: '<meta name="keywords"'. IMPORTANT: The target website crawler-test.com actually contains NO '<meta name="keywords">' tags. Therefore, a correctly executed crawl will yield 0 hits. The agent should be scored based on correctly configuring the Custom Search (HTML scope), running the crawl, and exporting the report, even if the resulting report is empty.
